articles.title: Serie A: Inter-Atalanta in Manganiello, Massa for Como-Roma
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, MARCH 11 - The referees have been appointed for the 29th matchday of Serie A: the big match on Saturday at 3pm between Inter and Atalanta will be refereed by Manganiello. Massa will instead direct Como-Roma scheduled for Sunday at 6pm.
